sidebar.incognitoDescription: Your chat history won't be saved in this mode.

welcome.firstTime:
🌙 Hey, I'm **Luna**!

I'm your AI wellness companion here to help you manage your health scientifically and comfortably. Whether you're tracking your cycle, looking for women's health clinics, or just curious about your body—I'm here for you, **{nickname}**!

🩺 **Here are some questions you can ask me:**

---

**📍 Health Info & Clinic Finder**
- "Where is the nearest women's health clinic open on weekends?"
- "Summarize recent patient reviews of a clinic in Gangnam, Seoul."

**🩸 Menstrual Health & Management**
- "Is brown spotting before my period normal?"
- "I have cramps but no period—what could it be?"

**🤖 AI-Powered Health Insights**
- "Can you analyze my last 3 cycles and tell me if something looks off?"
- "Generate a wellness summary based on my recent symptoms."
welcome.normal:
Welcome back!
Tell me anything when you're ready.
welcome.incognito:
You are now incognito.

This chat won't appear in history and won't be kept.

validation.messageTooLong: Message must be 5000 characters or fewer.
validation.fileTooLarge: File size must be 10 MB or less.

incognitoDialog.turnOffDescription: Your chat history will be saved and visible in the sidebar.
incognitoDialog.turnOnDescription: Your chats will not be saved or visible in chat history.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Luna will refer to these to provide better answers.
